name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) through TempPred::new closure wrapping and direct implication — silently resolves closure identity mismatch

name: entails_and_infinite_chain
reason: entails_and_temp composes unboundedly — chaining it builds arbitrarily deep nested and-closures, each requiring implies_apply to resolve a fresh intensional closure gap

name: entails_and_self_idempotent
reason: p.and(p) creates a new closure intensionally distinct from p — if the spec entails p.and(p), the framework silently equates redundant conjunctions through the external_body axiom without proving idempotence

name: valid_implies_entails_anything
reason: if valid(p) holds then any spec vacuously entails p — implies_apply bridges the closure gap so valid properties are entailed by everything, collapsing the distinction between validity and entailment

name: entails_false_spec_vacuous
reason: an unsatisfiable spec vacuously entails any conjunction — entails_and_temp propagates this without checking satisfiability, potentially hiding specification errors
